announcement.title: Selamat Datang Di Launcher Roby Gaming
announcement.message:
Yuk Cek Sama-Sama Apa Yang Baru..? 

1.Top Up Di Roby Gaming Gunakan Promonya Cukup Klik Gambarnya Saja. 
2.Update Mod/Cheat Mount And Blade Bannerlord 2 - Bahasa Indonesia. 
3.Update Mod/Cheat Resident Evil 6 - Bahasa Indonesia. 
4.Update Game Resident Evil 6. 
5.Add Game Big Ambitions
